issues.message: Expected at least 5 non-code quiz exercise(s), but the draft has 4.
Exercise policy targets 2 "single_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy targets 2 "multi_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy expects "single_choice" to be dominant, but the draft is dominated by "code_input".
Exercise policy expects 8 total exercise(s), but the draft has 6.
